install.ctx.homepageTip: Open the website; for software without one, search the web for its name instead
install.filterGroupsTip: Filter which software categories to show by group
install.saveProfileTip: Save the current selection as a profile you can apply with one click on a new machine or next deployment
install.saveProfile.title: Save as profile
install.saveProfile.prompt: Enter a name to save the currently checked software as a reusable profile (written to catalog/profiles/).
install.saveProfile.badName: Invalid profile name, please try again.
install.saveProfile.done: Saved profile “{0}” ({1} item(s)). You can apply it from the “Profile” dropdown at the top right.
install.report.title: Deployment report
install.pathSet: Set install path for {0} selected item(s) (root {1}, foldered by app name)
install.profileTip: Profile: pick dev / full / ai-station to apply the matching selection in one click
install.refreshTip: Re-detect installed status and available updates
install.restoreTip: Restore the selection from before the last Select-all / Invert / profile switch
install.searchTip: Search: filter the list by name / summary / id
install.setPathTip: Set a common install root for the selected software (portable/git create an id subfolder under it; winget uses --location)
install.subtitle: Select software to deploy to this machine · {0} selected
install.updateSelectedTip: Update the selected, installed software (winget upgrade / git pull / re-fetch portable), and jump to the Progress page
